title: Glossary of aerospace engineering
body: This glossary of aerospace engineering terms pertains specifically to aerospace engineering, its sub-disciplines, and related fields including aviation and aeronautics. For a broad overview of engineering, see glossary of engineering.
categories: Articles to be expanded from March 2022
Articles with empty sections from March 2022
Articles with unsourced statements from July 2019
Pages using Template:Physical constants with rounding
Short description with empty Wikidata description
